title: Family Group Chat
drDigitalIntro: You're organizing a family vacation and need to coordinate with relatives. Your task is to reply to messages, send a photo, add reactions, and handle a video call from a family member. During the call, you'll mute your microphone and turn off your camera. This is how families really use messaging and video calls!
drDigitalSuccess: You coordinated a family event using messages and video calls!
drDigitalHint: Start with a group message, then handle the video call.
